query:
INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) 
SELECT cg.id, 'Pão Tradicional', '0.00', 1, 1 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Tipo de Pão'
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.id, 'Pão Australiano', '2.00', 1, 2 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Tipo de Pão'
UNION ALL
SELECT cg.id, 'Pão Brioche', '3.00', 1, 3 FROM complementGroups cg 
INNER JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 30001 AND p.name = 'X-TUDO' AND cg.name = 'Tipo de Pão';
